summary: Keep active doordash-pp-cli PATH locations on the Node/CycleTLS wrapper and shared DoorDash session.
reason: Paperclip/Herman profile HOME and PATH ordering exposed stale generated Go binaries, causing DoorDash 403s and command-surface mismatches for browser-facing live calls.
validated_outcome: 2026-05-14T05:07Z: active command doctor reports authenticated=true/csrf_present=true; live read-only smoke passes for search/menu/item-options/convenience/orders/addresses/payment/cart; order place rejects without ALLOW_DOORDASH_ORDERING=1.
